name: Check of a book title and author in LYRASIS
fullName: Book detail view screen: Check of a book title and author in LYRASIS

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search 'available' book of distributor 'Axis 360' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
And  Book 'bookInfo' has correct title and author name on book details screen
And  The book cover is displayed on book details screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check of a book title and author in LYRASIS

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Check of a book title and author in LYRASIS
